```{r device associated incidence density rate table}
#| label: tab-device-associated-incidence-density-rates
#| tbl-cap: "Incidence densities of device-associated infections"
#| tbl-cap-location: bottom

table_device_associated_incidence_density_rates |>
  dplyr::rename("Q₁"="q1","Q₂"="q2","Q₃"="q3") |>
  dplyr::mutate(
    Infection = dplyr::case_match(
      as.character(.data$Infection),
      "cvc_ass_bsi" ~ "CVC",
      "pvc_ass_bsi" ~ "PVC",
      "vs_ass_hap" ~ "Any ventilatory support",
      "inv_ass_hap" ~ "INV",
      "niv_ass_hap" ~ "NIV")) |>
  gt(rowname_col = "Infection") |>
  fmt_number(decimals = 1) |>
  fmt_number(columns = "No of dev-ass inf.", decimals = 0) |>
  tab_row_group(label = "Vascular catheter associated sepsis / bloodstream infection", rows = 1:2, id = "grp_vc") |>
  tab_row_group(label = "Ventilatory support associated pneumonia", rows = 3:5, id = "grp_vs") |>
  row_group_order(groups = c("grp_vc", "grp_vs")) |>
  tab_spanner(
    label = "Dev-ass incidence density rate",
    columns = c("Pooled mean","Q₁","Q₂","Q₃"),
    id = "da_incidence_density_rate"
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = md(
      paste0(
        "$$\\parbox{6cm}{",
        "\\centering Device-associated incidence density rate",
        "} = \\frac{\\text{",
        "No of device-associated infections",
        "}}{\\text{",
        "Device days",
        "}} \\times ",
        format(1000, big.mark = locale_sep_mark),
        "$$"
      )),
    locations = cells_column_spanners(spanners = "da_incidence_density_rate")
  ) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "No of device-associated infections: The aggregated number of device-associated infections in all infants.",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = "No of dev-ass inf.")) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Pooled mean: The incidence density rate calculated as device-associated infections per 1000 device days calculated across all infants.",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = "Pooled mean")) |>
  tab_footnote(
    footnote = "Q₁, Q₂, Q₃: The quartiles (25%, 50% and 75% quantiles) of the device-associated incidence density rates of the partner departments",
    locations = cells_column_labels(columns = c("Q₁","Q₂","Q₃")))
```
